pi_items.source: Task description context, not verifiable from data or scripts
Task description context, not verifiable from data or scripts
setup_task.sh (creates model 'HP EliteBook 840 G7') and export_result.sh (evaluates success based on updates to this model's assets and uploads)
setup_task.sh (creates model 'HP EliteBook 840 G8') and export_result.sh (verifies this model's assets are unmodified against a baseline)
export_result.sh (queries status_labels WHERE name LIKE '%Hardware Recall%')

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data injected into Snipe-IT via setup scripts. The target model explicitly verified for quarantine and document upload is 'HP EliteBook 840 G7', while the control model explicitly verified to remain unmodified is 'HP EliteBook 840 G8'. The required quarantine status label is 'Hardware Recall'.
